reviews.comment:
El día q pasé no le funcionaban los sistemas de tarjeta y app YPF así se excusaba la gente q atendía.!!

(Translated by Google)
The day I went there, the YPF card and app systems weren't working; that's the excuse the staff gave.

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURHLU1pbjJBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy lindo lugar al aire libre p descansar y comer algo en medio de un viaje largo. Pero a la hora de cargar combustible,  todas las veces q hemos ido hubo problemas en el despacho. P cargar nafta demoramos 45 minutos! Terrible!!!!!

(Translated by Google)
A very nice outdoor spot to rest and have something to eat during a long trip. But when it comes to refueling, every time we've gone there have been problems at the pump. It took us 45 minutes to fill up! Terrible!

reviewReply.comment: Estamos obrando en solucionar el inconveniente que ocasiono su retraso en el despacho esperamos que su próxima visita sea grata
